1) Project Overview
===================



| Executive Summary Status | **Oracle Cloud Infrastructure JIRAcustomfield\_10301,customfield\_11140,customfield\_13217RYG Status,GA Date,Executive Summary 21key = FAAASPMO-1137 7dc25513-b840-3650-9d17-2a9f1a9822f6** |
| Architecture / Product Definition | * Design: [RODS Support for Dynamic Tables Replication](https://confluence.oraclecorp.com/confluence/pages/viewpage.action?spaceKey=OCIADP&title=RODS+Support+for+Dynamic+Tables+Replication)
 |
| Project Scope | * RODS is being enhanced to replicate **runtime-created dynamic/temporary tables** from **Fusion DB (FA DB)** to **Fusion ADW (FA ADW)** using **wildcard table-name patterns**, ensuring these transient tables and their dependent objects (editioning views, indexes) are automatically included during **provisioning** and **FA update/patch** workflows. The solution sources wildcard patterns from **XDF UDP****`TableNamePatterns`**, publishes them in the **RODS Manifest** via HCP, and updates **ADP bootstrap + GoldenGate** so both **initial bootstrap (Data Pump)** and **ongoing DDL/DML replication (GoldenGate)** cover all tables matched by the patterns.
 |
| Project Jira Links(Samples) | * [[FAAASPMO-1137] Bug 38242185: SUPPORT RODS REPLICATION FOR dynamically-created FA tables using wildcards](https://jira.oci.oraclecorp.com/browse/FAAASPMO-1137)
* [[FAAASINGES-2133] Bug 38242185: SUPPORT RODS REPLICATION FOR dynamically-created FA tables using wildcards -](https://jira.oci.oraclecorp.com/browse/FAAASINGES-2133)
 |
| Project Repository |  *[OraDOCS-FAaaS TPM Project Folder](https://oradocs.oracle.com/documents/folder/FAD787DC7A8210FEA9D68165BF194430072828036C9A)* |

expected_extraction.draft_eml:
Subject: [Meeting Prep] RODS Support for Dynamic Tables Replication — Status Update (T-2 days)
To: 
Cc: 

Source (Confluence): 

Project: RODS Support for Dynamic Tables Replication

1) ORM status
- Unknown (not specified on source page)

2) RAG summary
- AMBER — Development is largely complete and Beta AMS testing is progressing with many test cases completed, but recent issues requiring code fixes and an open lower-environment failure bug indicate residual risk before full validation/sign-off.

3) Schedule health
- At risk: a hard commitment is stated as “must be delivered by 3/7” for the SCM-provided .table file/patch deliverable, and while patches were delivered and validation is underway, remaining validation/sign-off and environment testing items introduce schedule risk.

4) Blockers (owners + ETAs)
- Code fixes required due to IACS introducing a new workflow that impacted changes for this project (encountered during ADP dev testing). Owner: ADP (Rahul/Raghav). ETA: TBD.
- Lower stack issue in BETA AMS: PREPARE_FILE_SYSTEM failed on OHS1 (FAAASHCP-50226). Owner: HCP Team. ETA: TBD.

5) Dependencies
- Share Documentation (Dynamic patterns) with SCM Team depends on JDeveloper tool changes.
- SCM provides .table file manually for private testing depends on patch availability in PINT (patch bundle 26.07 referenced).
- ADP Dev Testing depends on HCP manifest file and ADM DDL test file.

6) Per-stakeholder status roll-call
- Calin Rotaru (SCM): SCM patch/.table-file related items delivered; additional bugs to be provided for earlier patch lines (26.04 and 26.01). Next: provide new bugs as needed. ETA: TBD.
- Mahesh Narayanaswamy (HCP): Validating delivered patches; previously to share documentation page and provide POC update/ETA. Next: complete patch validation and share remaining documentation if needed. ETA: TBD.
- Raghu Kudaravalli (HCP): HCP POC marked complete; earlier action included providing manifest file. Next: support testing/validation as needed. ETA: TBD.
- HCP Team: HCP dev complete; Beta AMS testing largely completed; lower-stack bug tracked. Next: support ADP validation and address FAAASHCP-50226. ETA: TBD.
- Rahul Sharma (ADP): Beta deployment completed; issues required code fixes; ADP validation test cases identified. Next: run validation and complete test plan sign-off. ETA: TBD.
- Raghav S (ADP): Coordinating test plan review/sign-off and validation. Next: sign off and execute validation. ETA: TBD.
- Others (Roger Goossens, Subash Chadalavada, Neha Dokania, Yogesh Raina, Noel Das): No explicit updates captured on the page. Next/ETA: TBD.

7) Next steps (time-bound)
- Rahul Sharma / Raghav S: Review the test plan and complete sign-off (by 3/25 per page note; if not completed, do this sprint).
- ADP (Rahul/Raghav): Execute identified ADP validation test cases in BETA AMS (this sprint).
- HCP Team: Triage and resolve BETA AMS lower stack failure bug FAAASHCP-50226 (this sprint).
- ADP Team: Complete remaining code fixes related to IACS workflow impact found during testing (this sprint).
- Mahesh Narayanaswamy: Finish validation of delivered patches and report results (this sprint).
- Calin Rotaru (SCM): Provide new bugs for 26.04 and 26.01 patch lines if issues found (this sprint).

8) Exec asks
- None explicitly stated on the source page.
